name: Pazufloxacin
description: Pazufloxacin is under investigation in clinical trial NCT02592096 (Pazufloxacin Mesilate Ear Drops Clinical Trial Protocol).

interactions.name: Strontium ranelate
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Pazufloxacin can be decreased when it is combined with Strontium ranelate.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with Pazufloxacin.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Pazufloxacin.

interactions.name: Didanosine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Didanosine can be decreased when it is combined with Pazufloxacin.

interactions.name: Quinapril
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Pazufloxacin can be decreased when it is combined with Quinapril.

interactions.name: Sevelamer
interactions.description: Sevelamer can cause a decrease in the absorption of Pazufloxacin resulting in a reduced serum concentration and potentially a decrease in efficacy.

interactions.description: The serum concentration of Pazufloxacin can be decreased when it is combined with Sucralfate.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Pazufloxacin.
